title: Dr Arnike Redelinghuys: Natural healing through homeopathy
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Dr Arnike Redelinghuys is a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Dr Arnike Redelinghuys is a clinical and integrative Homeopathic practitioner who offers natural treatment options for acute or chronic medical conditions.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Dr Arnike Redelinghuys is a clinical and integrative Homeopathic practitioner who offers natural treatment options for acute or chronic medical conditions."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"She has a special interest in allergies, digestive health & autoimmune diseases."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"By primarily focusing on the individual rather than simply treating the given disease, she strives to educate her patients so they can make informed choices regarding their well-being.","html":"By primarily focusing on the individual rather than simply treating the given disease, she strives to educate her patients so they can make informed choices regarding their well-being."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Homeopathy is a natural medical system, based on the principle of “like cures like”, where the body’s natural defence system is stimulated to cure the disease by itself.","html":"Homeopathy is a natural medical system, based on the principle of “like cures like”, where the body’s natural defence system is stimulated to cure the disease by itself."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Homeopathy has the potential to treat almost any non-surgical disease and is safe to be used in any age group.","html":"Homeopathy has the potential to treat almost any non-surgical disease and is safe to be used in any age group."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dr Arnike Redelinghuys","html":"Dr Arnike Redelinghuys"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
